zh: 按住 Ctrl 点击 @标签跳转

en: A rain-burned recovery site with a weak uplink and a short scavenger loop.
zh: 一处被酸雨灼烧的回收点，链路微弱，只能维持短循环拾荒。
已从第 {tick} 回合读取存档。

en: Auto-paused: robot could not continue safely.
zh: 已自动暂停：机器人无法安全继续。
通信链路 // 未知信号

en: Rain is breaking the satellite uplink. Keep the scavenger on a short loop until we recover enough scrap.
zh: 酸雨正在撕裂卫星链路。先让拾荒机器人维持短循环，直到回收足够的废铁。

en: The script on the left feeds the robot logic core. Press play or single-frame after this briefing; the system will compile it on demand.
zh: 左侧脚本会写入机器人的逻辑核心。简报结束后点击播放或步进，系统会按需编译。

en: Recover the nearby scrap, expand logic memory, then we can route you toward the next unlocked site.
zh: 回收附近废铁，扩展逻辑内存，然后我们就能把路线指向下一个已解锁地点。

en: Go if last check is true
Go if last check is false

zh: 重写逻辑或先清理障碍

en: Turn back before the perimeter edge

zh: 重写逻辑或先清理障碍
中断原因：目标格被占用
绕开障碍或先腾空目标格

en: Route home before the battery floor
Check the forward cell before acting
zh: 执行动作前先检查前方

en: Simplify the loop or repair the branch

zh: 先修复诊断再重新部署
